root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily adds one more list-partitioning test case (and skips when `-race` is enabled). The available evidence does not indicate a targeted flaky-test stabilization change with a clear intermittent failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
